'''Dark Sword''' was the name of a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] made up of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] flying [[StealthX]] attack fighters and led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kenth Hamner]]. It was part of the [[First Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance First Fleet]] and one of the six squadrons compromising the [[StealthX wing]] commanded by [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>
